title: meringium reductum
side_effects: Meringium reductum can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset. In severe cases, prolonged use without proper regulation can result in an imbalance of electrolytes, causing muscle weakness, fatigue, and tremors. Additionally, some individuals may experience allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling, particularly if they have pre-existing sensitivities to plant extracts. In rare instances, improper use of meringium reductum can even lead to more serious complications, such as kidney damage or respiratory failure.
